readme.text:
Headless browser helpers for Cubid hosted verification, OTP, Allow Page, and
provider handoff flows.

## When To Choose This Package

Use

when you need Cubid's browser-safe helper layer but do not
want a React dependency. Choose

only when you need React
components or hooks on top of this package.

## Install

## Registry Availability

- npm: supported
- JSR: not published by policy

## API Reference

- JSON reference:

This package is headless by design. It does not ship React components and does
not require a root provider.
